_comment: Drop-in navigation snippet for your Mintlify docs.json (v3) or mint.json (v2). Merge the new groups under your existing 'navigation' key. Two top-level entries are added: 'Trading SDK' (hand-written guides under trading/) and three new groups under 'API Reference' (auto-generated from openapi-additions.json once you've merged it into your OpenAPI spec).
auto_generation_note: If you use Mintlify's auto-generated API Reference pages from your OpenAPI spec, the page slugs above (e.g. 'api-reference/trading/place-order') are derived from the operationId and tag in openapi-additions.json. Mintlify CLI command: `mintlify openapi-spec ./openapi.json -o api-reference/`. The exact slug pattern depends on your Mintlify settings; adjust the page paths in this nav to match what `mintlify dev` actually generates.
exchange_id_note: Mintlify slugs use kebab-case for the URL but read camelCase in `operationId`. The 6 trading endpoints have operationIds: placeOrder, listOrders, getOrder, cancelOrder, registerCredentials, listCredentials, derivePolymarketCredentials, verifyPolymarketCredentials, getPolymarketSafeAddress. Mintlify will typically slugify these to: place-order, list-orders, get-order, cancel-order, register-credentials, list-credentials, derive-polymarket-credentials, verify-polymarket-credentials, get-polymarket-safe-address.
